steps.assistant_text: Bit set/clear template at -O0. Source has 4 register locals (p1, p2, set, t) — matches IDO's a1/a2/a3 + reload-into-t0 pattern. The 'set' constant determines the dispatched arm; both arms are emitted as dead code per -O0 conventions. Per feedback_o0_cluster_split_with_layout_shim.md.
